name: deep-goal
description: Paid add-on to deep-skills: /deep-goal is an autonomous, rigor-gated conductor that runs a full Deep-* effort end-to-end from one invocation — plan → review → implement → code-review → bugfix → docs — at a chosen rigor level (yolo/poc/mvp/prod). Requires the deep-skills plugin ≥ 0.2.0.
